I can confirm this NPC in PoK sells Tiny Daggers
▲ Page top
Where to find Tiny Daggers as of May 16, 2012
QuoteReply
# May 17 2012 at 11:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592342721886
Scholar
18 posts
On May 16, 2012, after a long search I found none in PoK or Crescent Reach. I found them in Erudin Palace upstairs near Nikina (the Enchanter GM) at a cost 1s each.
▲ Page top
Tiny Daggers
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2008 at 7:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592265373580
14 posts
Researcher Kakra in Cresent Reach sells them. I bought 100 for 1pp

Vendor in POK
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2004 at 6:46 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591795205818
Scholar
47 posts
The most convenient place to get Tiny daggers is in the Plane of Knowledge from Darius Gandril (dark elf by the fishing pond) in the Western building. Yes they are THAT easy to find...
▲ Page top

tiny dagger
QuoteReply
# Sep 17 2003 at 4:04 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592257080752
3 posts
Can also be found in Shadow Haven at "Bargain Merchant" loc.223.50,287.15
▲ Page top
Vendors In Freeport?
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2003 at 3:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591793357336
107 posts
Where do I find them in Freeport?
▲ Page top
RE: Vendors In Freeport?
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2003 at 9:14 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592345124682
Sage
164 posts
Dulia Jestes sells tiny daggers in Freeport. She stands outside in the south west corner of the court yard that contains the floating casters building (marked 5 on the map at eqatals for West Freeport).
▲ Page top
Vendor in AkAnon
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2003 at 12:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966287428
Scholar
21 posts
There is a clockwork vendor labeled as Enchanter Supplies in the library in AkAnon. The vendor is where all the other caster spell vendors and guildmasters are. This vendor also sells Tiny Daggers.

▲ Page top
RE: Vendor in AkAnon
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2003 at 2:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591796556262
3 posts
their is no vender their that will even talk to you
▲ Page top

10 posts

# Jun 04 2003 at 7:24 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592256205829
Scholar
44 posts
Tiny Daggers can also be purchased from Gwynora Armista in Enchanter Area of Erudin Palace
